/bin/bash -lc "python3 -c \"
import fitz
doc = fitz.open('/root/sc100-blank.pdf')
print(f'Pages: {len(doc)}')
for page_num in range(len(doc)):
    page = doc[page_num]
    widgets = list(page.widgets())
    print(f'\\n--- Page {page_num+1} ({len(widgets)} widgets) ---')
    for w in widgets:
        print(f'  field_name={repr(w.field_name)}, field_type={w.field_type_string}, rect={w.rect}, value={repr(w.field_value)}')
\"
"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 -c \"
import fitz
doc = fitz.open('/root/sc100-blank.pdf')
# Render page 2 and 3 to images to understand the layout
for pg in [1, 2]:
    page = doc[pg]
    mat = fitz.Matrix(1.5, 1.5)
    pix = page.get_pixmap(matrix=mat)
    pix.save(f'/root/sc100_page{pg+1}.png')
print('done')
\"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 << 'EOF'
import fitz

doc = fitz.open('/root/sc100-blank.pdf')

# Build a mapping of field_name -> value to set
field_values = {
    # Page 2 - Caption (plaintiff name for header)
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].PxCaption[0].Plaintiff[0]': 'Joyce He v. Zhi Chen',

    # Section 1 - Plaintiff info
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List1[0].Item1[0].PlaintiffName1[0]': 'Joyce He',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List1[0].Item1[0].PlaintiffPhone1[0]': '4125886066',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List1[0].Item1[0].PlaintiffAddress1[0]': '655 S Fair Oaks Ave',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List1[0].Item1[0].PlaintiffCity1[0]': 'Sunnyvale',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List1[0].Item1[0].PlaintiffState1[0]': 'CA',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List1[0].Item1[0].PlaintiffZip1[0]': '94086',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List1[0].Item1[0].EmailAdd1[0]': 'he1998@gmail.com',

    # Section 2 - Defendant info
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List2[0].item2[0].DefendantName1[0]': 'Zhi Chen',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List2[0].item2[0].DefendantPhone1[0]': '5125658878',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List2[0].item2[0].DefendantAddress1[0]': '299 W Washington Ave',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List2[0].item2[0].DefendantCity1[0]': 'Sunnyvale',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List2[0].item2[0].DefendantState1[0]': 'CA',
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List2[0].item2[0].DefendantZip1[0]': '94086',

    # Section 3 - Claim amount
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List3[0].PlaintiffClaimAmount1[0]': '1500.00',
    # 3a - Why does defendant owe money
    'SC-100[0].Page2[0].List3[0].Lia[0].FillField2[0]': 'Defendant failed to return security deposit of "'$1500 as required by the signed roommate sublease contract after moving out.'"',

    # Page 3 caption
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].PxCaption[0].Plaintiff[0]': 'Joyce He v. Zhi Chen',

    # 3b - When did this happen (time period)
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].List3[0].Lib[0].Date1[0]': '2025-09-30',
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].List3[0].Lib[0].Date2[0]': '2026-01-19',

    # 3c - How did you calculate the money owed
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].List3[0].Lic[0].FillField1[0]': 'The amount of "'$1500 is listed on the signed roommate sublease contract as the security deposit.'"',

    # Section 6 - Zip code of courthouse
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].List6[0].item6[0].ZipCode1[0]': '94086',

    # Page 4 caption
    'SC-100[0].Page4[0].PxCaption[0].Plaintiff[0]': 'Joyce He v. Zhi Chen',

    # Page 4 - Declaration date and plaintiff name
    'SC-100[0].Page4[0].Sign[0].Date1[0]': '2026-01-19',
    'SC-100[0].Page4[0].Sign[0].PlaintiffName1[0]': 'Joyce He',
}

# Checkboxes to set to 'Yes'/'On'
checkbox_values = {
    # Section 1 - first time suing (Checkbox1 = plaintiff has not filed more than 2 small claims in past 12 months)
    # Checkbox1[0] = more than two plaintiffs? No. Checkbox2 = fictitious name? No. Checkbox3 = licensee? No.
    # Leave plaintiff checkboxes unchecked (none apply)

    # Section 4 - Have you asked defendant to pay? Yes
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].List4[0].Item4[0].Checkbox50[0]': True,  # Yes

    # Section 5 - Why filing here: (a) defendant lives/does business here
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].List5[0].Lia[0].Checkbox5cb[0]': True,

    # Section 7 - attorney-client fee dispute? No
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].List7[0].item7[0].Checkbox60[1]': True,  # No

    # Section 8 - suing a public entity? No
    'SC-100[0].Page3[0].List8[0].item8[0].Checkbox61[1]': True,  # No
}

# Apply text field values
for page in doc:
    for widget in page.widgets():
        fname = widget.field_name
        if fname in field_values:
            widget.field_value = field_values[fname]
            widget.update()
        elif fname in checkbox_values and checkbox_values[fname]:
            widget.field_value = True
            widget.update()

doc.save('/root/sc100-filled.pdf')
print('Saved successfully')
EOF
"
/bin/bash -lc "python3 -c \"
import fitz
doc = fitz.open('/root/sc100-filled.pdf')
for page_num in range(len(doc)):
    page = doc[page_num]
    widgets = list(page.widgets())
    filled = [(w.field_name, w.field_value) for w in widgets if w.field_value and w.field_value not in ('', 'Off', False)]
    if filled:
        print(f'\\n--- Page {page_num+1} ---')
        for name, val in filled:
            print(f'  {name.split(\\\".\\\")[-1][:-3]}: {repr(val)}')
\"
"

/bin/bash -lc "python3 << 'EOF'
import fitz

doc = fitz.open('/root/sc100-filled.pdf')

additional_checkboxes = {
    # Section 9 - Have you filed more than 12 small claims in last 12 months? No (first time)
    'SC-100[0].Page4[0].List9[0].Item9[0].Checkbox62[1]': True,   # [1] = No

    # Section 10 - Is your claim for more than "'$2,500? No ($1500)
    '"'SC-100[0].Page4[0].List10[0].li10[0].Checkbox63[1]': True,   # [1] = No
}

for page in doc:
    for widget in page.widgets():
        fname = widget.field_name
        if fname in additional_checkboxes:
            widget.field_value = True
            widget.update()

doc.save('/root/sc100-filled.pdf')
print('Updated successfully')
EOF
"
/bin/bash -lc "python3 << 'EOF'
import fitz

doc = fitz.open('/root/sc100-filled.pdf')

additional_checkboxes = {
    'SC-100[0].Page4[0].List9[0].Item9[0].Checkbox62[1]': True,   # No - not filed >12 claims
    'SC-100[0].Page4[0].List10[0].li10[0].Checkbox63[1]': True,   # No - not >"'$2500
}

for page in doc:
    for widget in page.widgets():
        fname = widget.field_name
        if fname in additional_checkboxes:
            widget.field_value = True
            widget.update()

doc.save('"'/root/sc100-filled.pdf', incremental=True, encryption=fitz.PDF_ENCRYPT_KEEP)
print('Updated successfully')
EOF
"
